        _ = (M ◁ (M ∘ M)) ◁ (M ◁ (M ∘ M)) := by rw [M.call]
        _ = ((M ∘ M) ◁ (M ∘ M)) ◁ ((M ∘ M) ◁ (M ∘ M)) := by rw [M.call]
        _ = M ◁ (M ◁ (M ∘ M)) ◁ ((M ∘ M) ◁ (M ∘ M)) := by rw [composition, composition]
        _ = (M ◁ (M ∘ M)) ◁ (M ◁ (M ∘ M)) := by rw [M.call]
        _ = (M ∘ M) ◁ (M ∘ M) := by rw [M.call]
